{
	"settings": {
		"section": "",
		"package": false,
		"default": true,
		"hidden": true,
		"supportsUrlLoad": false
	},
	"loadConditions": {
		"actions": [],
		"categories": [
			"Pages with navboxes"
		],
		"namespaces": [],
		"contentModels": [],
		"rights": []
	},
	"module": {
		"pages": [
			"variables.css",
			"main.css",
			"custom.css"
		],
		"dependencies": [],
		"type": "styles"
	}
}
